form.title: Quiz
form.subtitle: Create your own interactive quiz!
form.importCSV_title: Import questions from a Twitchat exported CSV file:
form.importCSV_format_note_correct: In classic mode, prefix correct answers with * (eg. *Twitchat)
form.importCSV_format_note_optional: Duration and Tolerance are optional. Leave them empty to use the quiz's default values
form.importCSV_format_note_separator: Columns are separated with a semicolon ;
form.importOpenQuizzDB_title: Head over {URL} to download a Quiz as a CSV file then click button bellow:
form.import_invalid_file: Invalid file format. Please upload a CSV file with the correct structure.
form.premium_limit: You reached the limit of {MAX} quizzes you can create.
form.non_premium_limit:
You reached the limit of {MAX} quiz you can create.
Become a premium member to create up to {MAX_PREMIUM} quizzes.
form.premium_question_limit: You reached the limit of {MAX} questions you can add.
form.nonpremium_question_limit:
You reached the limit of {MAX} questions you can add.
Become a premium to add up to {MAX_PREMIUM} questions.

delete_confirm.description:
Quiz will be deleted
This cannot be undone.
delete_confirm.title: Delete quiz?

form.param_time_based_scoring:
Time-based scoring
(more points for faster answers)
form.param_loose_on_fail:
Lose points on fail
(wrong answers remove points)
form.param_max_answers:
Limit answers per question
(only accept the first users to answer)
form.param_max_answers_value: Only accept the first answer|Only accept the {VALUE} first answers
form.param_shuffle_answers:
Shuffle answers
(randomize answers order on the overlay)

mode_majority.title: Majority
mode_majority.description:
Majority choice question.

All answers are wrong.
Viewers must guess which answer will receive the most votes.

lost_progress_warning.title: Quiz in progress
lost_progress_warning.description_other: If you enable this quiz, you will lose the progress of the quiz "{NAME}"
lost_progress_warning.description_self: If you disable this quiz you'll lose it's progress!

reset_confirm.title: Reset quiz?
reset_confirm.description:
Quiz progress will be lost
This cannot be undone.
